title: Pixelmon Speedup
description: This mod aggressively optimizes the battling engine of the Pixelmon mod to reduce the waiting buffer within battles.
body: This mod aggressively speeds up the battling engine of the Pixelmon mod to remove arbitrary and bothersome wait times / delays that hinder player enjoyment. Created by a fan with no relation to the Pixelmon development team. Support the pixelmon mod.
